[ラベルリンクベース]

番号差分種別名前識別子 / 変更前の値 -> 変更後の値
変更ラベルリンクベースjptoi_2025-11-01_lab.xml
変更   拡張リンク宣言   http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/link
00001削除      ラベルリンク      株主総会における決議内容（該当なし） (jptoi_cor:ContentsOfResolutionByShareholdersMeetingNATextBlock) -- 株主総会における決議内容（該当なし） [label, ja] : [link, concept-label]

00007削除      ラベルリンク      上記の決議に基づいて既に取得した自己の株式に係る上場株券等（該当なし） (jptoi_cor:ShareCertificatesEtcRelatedToOwnSharesAlreadyAcquiredBySaidResolutionNATextBlock) -- 上記の決議に基づいて既に取得した自己の株式に係る上場株券等（該当なし） [label, ja] : [link, concept-label]
00008削除      ラベルリンク      上記の決議に基づいて既に取得した自己の株式に係る上場株券等（該当なし） (jptoi_cor:ShareCertificatesEtcRelatedToOwnSharesAlreadyAcquiredBySaidResolutionNATextBlock) -- 上記の決議に基づいて既に取得した自己の株式に係る上場株券等（該当なし） [テキストブロック] [verboseLabel, ja] : [link, concept-label]
00009削除      ラベルリンク      上場株券等の取得に関する許可等（該当なし） (jptoi_cor:PermitEtcRegardingAcquisitionOfListedShareCertificatesEtcNA) -- 上場株券等の取得に関する許可等（該当なし） [label, ja] : [link, concept-label]

変更ラベルリンクベースjptoi_2025-11-01_lab-en.xml
変更   拡張リンク宣言   http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/link
00031削除      ラベルリンク      株主総会における決議内容（該当なし） (jptoi_cor:ContentsOfResolutionByShareholdersMeetingNATextBlock) -- Contents of resolution by shareholders' meeting (N/A) [label, en] : [link, concept-label]

00036削除      ラベルリンク      その他（該当なし） (jptoi_cor:OtherMattersContentsEtcOfResolutionsEtcByShareholdersMeetingOrBoardOfDirectorsMeetingNATextBlock) -- Other matters, Contents, etc. of resolutions, etc. by shareholders' meeting or board of directors' meeting (N/A) [text block] [verboseLabel, en] : [link, concept-label]
00037削除      ラベルリンク      上記の決議に基づいて既に取得した自己の株式に係る上場株券等（該当なし） (jptoi_cor:ShareCertificatesEtcRelatedToOwnSharesAlreadyAcquiredBySaidResolutionNATextBlock) -- Listed share certificates, etc. related to own shares already acquired by said resolution (N/A) [label, en] : [link, concept-label]
00038削除      ラベルリンク      上記の決議に基づいて既に取得した自己の株式に係る上場株券等（該当なし） (jptoi_cor:ShareCertificatesEtcRelatedToOwnSharesAlreadyAcquiredBySaidResolutionNATextBlock) -- Listed share certificates, etc. related to own shares already acquired by said resolution (N/A) [text block] [verboseLabel, en] : [link, concept-label]

変更      ラベルリンク      上場株券等の保管及び返還を行う金融商品取引業者・銀行等の名称及び本店の所在地 (jptoi_cor:NameAndLocationOfRegisteredHeadquarterOfFinancialInstrumentsBusinessOperatorBankEtcToHandleCustodyAndReturnOfListedShareCertificatesEtcHeading) -- Name and location of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc. [label, en] : [link, concept-label]
変更         ラベル         Name and location of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc. [label, en]
00041変更            値            "Name and location of registered headquarter of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc." -> "Name and location of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc."
変更      ラベルリンク      上場株券等の保管及び返還を行う金融商品取引業者・銀行等の名称及び本店の所在地 (jptoi_cor:NameAndLocationOfRegisteredHeadquarterOfFinancialInstrumentsBusinessOperatorBankEtcToHandleCustodyAndReturnOfListedShareCertificatesEtcHeading) -- Name and location of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc. [heading] [verboseLabel, en] : [link, concept-label]
変更         ラベル         Name and location of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc. [heading] [verboseLabel, en]
00042変更            値            "Name and location of registered headquarter of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc. [heading]" -> "Name and location of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc. [heading]"
変更      ラベルリンク      上場株券等の保管及び返還を行う金融商品取引業者・銀行等の名称及び本店の所在地 (jptoi_cor:NameAndLocationOfRegisteredHeadquarterOfFinancialInstrumentsBusinessOperatorBankEtcToHandleCustodyAndReturnOfListedShareCertificatesEtcTextBlock) -- Name and location of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc. [label, en] : [link, concept-label]
変更         ラベル         Name and location of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc. [label, en]
00043変更            値            "Name and location of registered headquarter of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc." -> "Name and location of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc."
変更      ラベルリンク      上場株券等の保管及び返還を行う金融商品取引業者・銀行等の名称及び本店の所在地 (jptoi_cor:NameAndLocationOfRegisteredHeadquarterOfFinancialInstrumentsBusinessOperatorBankEtcToHandleCustodyAndReturnOfListedShareCertificatesEtcTextBlock) -- Name and location of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc. [text block] [verboseLabel, en] : [link, concept-label]
変更         ラベル         Name and location of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc. [text block] [verboseLabel, en]
00044変更            値            "Name and location of registered headquarter of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc. [text block]" -> "Name and location of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle custody and return of listed share certificates, etc. [text block]"
変更      ラベルリンク      買付け等の決済をする金融商品取引業者・銀行等の名称及び本店の所在地 (jptoi_cor:NameAndAddressOfRegisteredHeadquarterOfFinancialInstrumentsBusinessOperatorBankEtcToHandleSettlementOfPurchaseEtcHeading) -- Name and address of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle settlement of purchase, etc. [label, en] : [link, concept-label]
変更         ラベル         Name and address of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle settlement of purchase, etc. [label, en]
00045変更            値            "Name and address of registered headquarter of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle settlement of purchase, etc." -> "Name and address of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle settlement of purchase, etc."
変更      ラベルリンク      買付け等の決済をする金融商品取引業者・銀行等の名称及び本店の所在地 (jptoi_cor:NameAndAddressOfRegisteredHeadquarterOfFinancialInstrumentsBusinessOperatorBankEtcToHandleSettlementOfPurchaseEtcHeading) -- Name and address of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle settlement of purchase, etc. [heading] [verboseLabel, en] : [link, concept-label]

変更         ラベル         Name and address of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle settlement of purchase, etc. [label, en]
00047変更            値            "Name and address of registered headquarter of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle settlement of purchase, etc." -> "Name and address of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle settlement of purchase, etc."
変更      ラベルリンク      買付け等の決済をする金融商品取引業者・銀行等の名称及び本店の所在地 (jptoi_cor:NameAndAddressOfRegisteredHeadquarterOfFinancialInstrumentsBusinessOperatorBankEtcToHandleSettlementOfPurchaseEtcTextBlock) -- Name and address of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle settlement of purchase, etc. [text block] [verboseLabel, en] : [link, concept-label]

変更      ラベルリンク      上場株券等の返還を行う金融商品取引業者・銀行等の名称及び所在地 (jptoi_cor:NameAndAddressOfRegisteredHeadquarterOfFinancialInstrumentsBusinessOperatorBankEtcToHandleReturnOfListedShareCertificatesEtcTextBlock) -- Name and address of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle return of listed share certificates, etc. [text block] [verboseLabel, en] : [link, concept-label]
変更         ラベル         Name and address of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle return of listed share certificates, etc. [text block] [verboseLabel, en]
00054変更            値            "Name and address of registered headquarter of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle return of listed share certificates, etc. [text block]" -> "Name and address of registered head office of financial instruments business operator, bank, etc. to handle return of listed share certificates, etc. [text block]"
00055削除      ラベルリンク      あん分比例方式により買付け等を行う場合の計算（該当なし） (jptoi_cor:CalculationForPurchaseEtcByMethodOfProportionalDistributionNA) -- Calculation for purchase, etc. by method of proportional distribution (N/A) [label, en] : [link, concept-label]
00056削除      ラベルリンク      あん分比例方式により買付け等を行う場合の計算（該当なし） (jptoi_cor:CalculationForPurchaseEtcByMethodOfProportionalDistributionNA) -- Calculation for purchase, etc. by method of proportional distribution (N/A) [verboseLabel, en] : [link, concept-label]

00058削除      ラベルリンク      届出者の住所又は所在地 (jptoi_cor:ResidentialAddressOrLocationOfFilerOfNotificationCoverPage) -- Residential address or location of filer of notification, Cover page [verboseLabel, en] : [link, concept-label]
